title: [BUG] Documentation for duplicateRow is incorrect (defaults are wrong)
author: imatwork
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Documentation for `duplicateRow` is incorrect

Call signature is `worksheet.duplicateRow(row, [count=0, [insert=false]])` [found here](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/da5e743126753e5ade98ac33869b9884c546f248/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L418) but the documentation says `worksheet.duplicateRow(row, [count=1, [insert=true]])` [found here](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs#duplicate-a-row)

Lib version: 4.3.0

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body:
@imatwork 
hi, imatwork, Will you submit a PR for this?

comments.author: imatwork
